title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics

jsonLd.title: Senior Fleet Manager at Jet Freight Logistics
jsonLd.description:
Jet Freight Logistics invites applications from qualified candidates for the position of Fleet Manager at our Jaipur location. This role offers excellent career advancement prospects.

About Jet Freight Logistics:
Jet Freight Logistics is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with customer service teams to resolve delivery issues
• Oversee end-to-end logistics operations for timely delivery
• Implement cost-saving initiatives in transportation and warehousing
• Prepare MIS reports on delivery performance and SLA adherence
• Conduct periodic vendor audits and evaluate logistics partners
• Track shipments in real-time and resolve delivery exceptions
• Manage a fleet of vehicles and coordinate with drivers

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• Chartered Accountant (ICAI)
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Supply Chain Management
• Proficiency in SAP SCM
• Proficiency in Inventory Management
• Proficiency in WMS
• Proficiency in Vendor Management
• Proficiency in TMS
• Proficiency in 3PL Management
• Proficiency in Route Optimization

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Life and accident insurance
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Transportation and conveyance allowance
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jaipur, Rajasthan, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Jet Freight Logistics!
